TUTORIAL.SLIDE_1: Choose your initial team of 3 Pokémon.
TUTORIAL.SLIDE_2: Use rerolls to change and improve your options.
TUTORIAL.SLIDE_3: Battles depend on stats and types.
TUTORIAL.SLIDE_4: Use items to heal, revive, or boost.
TUTORIAL.SLIDE_5: Activate items at the key moment.

TABLERO.TITLE: Pokémon Battle
TABLERO.REVIVE_PROMPT: Select a fainted Pokémon to revive
TABLERO.LEAGUE_VICTORY: You have overcome the Pokémon League with honor.
TABLERO.LEAGUE_ARRIVAL: YOU HAVE REACHED THE POKÉMON LEAGUE!
TABLERO.TEAM_HEALED: Your team has been fully healed.
TABLERO.FINAL_CHALLENGE: Prepare yourself for the final challenge.

ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.instant-win: Win the battle automatically (Master Ball Effect).
ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.capture: Capture the current opponent immediately and force you to swap it with one of your team.
ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.shield: Protects from defeat: If you lose, the Pokémon does not faint.
ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.reroll-stat: Reroll the stat selected for the battle.
ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.revive-all: Revive ALL fainted Pokémon on your team.
ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.tier-boost: Your team evolves to Tier 3 temporarily for this battle.
ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.opponent-reroll: Change the current opponent for another random one (Doesn't work in League).
ITEM_DESCRIPTIONS.revive-one: Revive a Pokémon of your choice from your team.
